text: Being here, surrounded by clean glass, ordered chairs, and instructive signs, I feel suspended between transparency and separation. The space is modern and open, yet its clarity brings a certain sterile stillness. Moving toward the vivid wall marked R+D, I sense both curiosity and a subtle alienation. The philosophical reflections displayed remind me of the fragility of perception. Here, I teeter between clarity and confusion, comforted by the pursuit of knowledge yet unsettled by how easily meaning can slip away.
